commands: set -e
echo '=== Pre-counts ==='
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS customers FROM `tabCustomer`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS items FROM `tabItem`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS sales_invoices FROM `tabSales Invoice`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS sales_orders FROM `tabSales Order`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS quotations FROM `tabQuotation`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivery_notes FROM `tabDelivery Note`']"
echo '=== Backup before purge ==='
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend backup --with-files'
echo '=== Purging sales child tables ==='
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Invoice Item`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Order Item`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabDelivery Note Item`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabQuotation Item`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabPayment Entry Reference`']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabGL Entry` WHERE voucher_type IN (\'Sales Invoice\',\'Sales Order\',\'Delivery Note\',\'Quotation\',\'Payment Entry\')']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Taxes and Charges` WHERE parenttype IN (\'Sales Invoice\',\'Sales Order\',\'Delivery Note\',\'Quotation\')']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Team` WHERE parenttype IN (\'Sales Invoice\',\'Sales Order\',\'Delivery Note\',\'Quotation\')']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabPayment Schedule` WHERE parenttype IN (\'Sales Invoice\',\'Sales Order\',\'Quotation\')']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabPacked Item` WHERE parenttype IN (\'Sales Invoice\',\'Sales Order\',\'Delivery Note\',\'Quotation\')']"
echo '=== Purging sales parent tables ==='
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabPOS Invoice`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Invoice`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabDelivery Note`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabSales Order`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabQuotation`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabPayment Entry`']"
echo '=== Purging customer data ==='

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabDynamic Link` WHERE link_doctype=\'Customer\'']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabCustomer`']"
echo '=== Purging item/inventory data ==='

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabUOM Conversion Detail` WHERE parenttype=\'Item\'']"

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabBin`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['DELETE FROM `tabItem`']"
echo '=== Final cleanup ==='
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site frontend clear-cache && bench --site frontend clear-website-cache'
echo '=== Post-counts ==='
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS customers FROM `tabCustomer`']"
docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS items FROM `tabItem`']"
